# Ratchet Rebaseline Approval 2026-05-11

Approved-by: Repository owner via chat request
Reason: Retire Markdown planning documents and generated artifacts from large-file and structural-debt policy surfaces, remove stale structural debt entries after same-change shrink work brings files to or below target, remove stale coverage debt entries after same-change focused proof brings files to full coverage, and retire stale typing debt allowlist entries after same-change pyright proof shows the promoted files already pass strict checking. This approval covers removing the `docs/exec-plans/feature-roadmap.md` and `docs/exec-plans/tech-debt-tracker.md` structural debt entries from `artifacts/analysis/file_debt_ratchet.json`, removing the aligned Markdown metrics from `artifacts/analysis/structural_budget_ratchet.json`, removing stale structural debt rows such as `tests/test_pipeline_collection.py` after verified shrink work, tightening stale structural debt metadata for `src/sattlint/devtools/repo_audit.py` and `src/sattlint/analyzers/modules.py` after verified same-change shrink work or to restore shrink-only convergence for oversized owner slices, removing stale coverage debt rows or dimensions for `src/sattlint/app_analysis.py`, `src/sattlint/devtools/_structural_budget_inventory.py`, `src/sattlint/docgenerator/configgen.py`, and `src/sattlint/path_sanitizer.py` after verified same-change full-file proof, retiring stale typing debt allowlist entries for `src/sattlint/app_base.py`, `src/sattlint/app_cli_commands.py`, `src/sattlint/app_docs.py`, `src/sattlint/app_graphics.py`, `src/sattlint/app_menus.py`, and `src/sattlint/app_support.py` after verified same-change pyright proof, refreshing checked-in repo-health outputs so they match the new policy, and removing newly stale debt ledger rows that now meet their strict targets without loosening any baseline. This approval does not waive monotonic structural, typing, or coverage ratchet rules for code surfaces.
